name: google-workspace-mcp
description: Complete Google Workspace integration -- Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, Tasks, Contacts, Chat, Apps Script, and Custom Search via MCP with workflow guidance.

google_oauth_client_id.title: Google OAuth Client ID
google_oauth_client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console

google_oauth_client_secret.title: Google OAuth Client Secret
google_oauth_client_secret.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

server_args.title: Server arguments
server_args.description: CLI arguments for the MCP server. Examples: --tools gmail drive, --tool-tier core, --read-only, --permissions gmail:send drive:readonly. Leave empty for all tools with full access.
